overall.description: First-person helicopter cockpit view navigating through a dense urban environment engulfed in heavy brown haze or sandstorm. The aircraft performs banking maneuvers between skyscrapers with extremely low visibility, gradually descending closer to building facades in what appears to be a flight simulation game.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial corridor above dense urban core

events.description: helicopter begins gentle left bank while maintaining altitude

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter through heavy haze at moderate altitude, maintaining steady forward trajectory over the obscured cityscape

entered.detail: flight instrument cluster labeled ASXGS with multiple gauges and digital readouts
curved cockpit window frame with dark structural supports
silhouettes of skyscrapers barely visible through dense brown haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view of a helicopter flying through extremely hazy conditions over a city. The instrument panel is visible on the left, while the forward view shows only the ghostly outlines of distant skyscrapers through the brown atmospheric haze. The aircraft maintains steady forward flight with a slight left bank.

events.description: helicopter executes pronounced left bank turn, rotating view toward city center
visibility decreases further as helicopter descends into denser haze layer between buildings

agents.ego_description: maneuvering helicopter through banking turns, descending gradually while navigating toward the clustered skyscrapers

entered.detail: group of high-rise buildings becoming visible as the helicopter approaches the urban core

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks left and right as it navigates deeper into the city, with tall skyscrapers emerging from the haze. The visibility worsens as the aircraft descends into the urban canyon. The instrument panel tilts with the banking maneuvers while the window frame remains fixed, showing the rotating cityscape outside.

events.description: helicopter enters steep descent, bringing building facades into very close proximity
view becomes almost entirely obscured by dense brown fog as helicopter enters thick cloud layer or sandstorm

agents.ego_description: executing evasive or exploratory maneuvers between buildings, descending rapidly with steep angles, losing visual reference in dense fog

entered.detail: textured exterior wall of skyscraper passing within close proximity to the helicopter

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the helicopter descending rapidly between buildings, with skyscraper facades rushing by extremely close to the aircraft. The visibility drops to near zero as the helicopter enters an extremely dense layer of brown fog or sand, eventually obscuring all external reference points. The instrument panel remains visible throughout the disorienting descent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a first-person cockpit perspective as a helicopter navigates a hazy urban landscape that descends into a total brownout. It begins with a steady forward flight through a thick atmospheric haze, where only the ghostly outlines of distant skyscrapers are visible beyond the instrument panel. As the aircraft banks left and right to navigate deeper into the city, the skyscrapers emerge more clearly before the helicopter descends into a narrow urban canyon. The scene then shifts into a rapid descent between building facades that rush past in close proximity, while the visibility steadily drops. Finally, the aircraft plunges into an extremely dense layer of brown fog that completely obscures all external reference points, leaving only the glowing instrument panel visible.
